title: DivineRPG Compatability
description: This mod adds compatability to DivineRPG with various other mods
body:
This mod is designed to add mod compatibility with DivineRPG

This mod could be embedded into DivineRPG by itself however it was decided that a standalone mod would be better so players who don't care for compatibility don't get console spam or other issues

Supported in version 1.20.1

Advanced Mining Dimension: https://modrinth.com/mod/advanced-mining-dimension
Mystical customization: https://modrinth.com/mod/mystical-customization

Resource Pandas: https://modrinth.com/mod/resource-pandas

Productive Bees: https://modrinth.com/mod/productivebees

Iron Jetpacks: https://modrinth.com/mod/iron-jetpacks

Industrial Foregoing: https://modrinth.com/mod/industrial-foregoing

Ender IO: https://modrinth.com/mod/enderio
